slides.title:
The *Stupid Problems*
You Run Into
slides.subtitle: And how AI solves them better. A hands-on workshop.

cards.title: Time wasted on repetition
cards.description: Tasks that should take 5 minutes take 5 hours because nobody built the right tool.

cards.title: Knowledge locked in heads
cards.description: One person knows how something works. When they're gone, so is the knowledge.

cards.title: Decisions made on gut
cards.description: No data. No system. Just vibes - and then wondering why results are inconsistent.

cards.title: Reports that go nowhere
cards.description: Hours of work to produce something nobody reads or acts on.

slides.title:
You don't need to code.
You need to *describe.*
slides.subtitle: Claude Code turns plain English into working software. Your job is to understand the problem clearly enough to explain it.
slides.code:
# This is all it takes to start
claude

# Then just talk to it
"Build me a tool that takes a client meeting summary
and generates a follow-up email in our tone of voice.
Include next steps and a subject line."

slides.title: What you're *building today*
slides.subtitle: Done and working beats perfect and unfinished. You have until the end of the session.

steps.title: Pick your problem
steps.description: one real thing that wastes your team's time

steps.title: Define it clearly
steps.description: one sentence: who has it, what it costs them

steps.title: Build with Claude Code
steps.description: describe what you want, iterate fast

steps.title: Demo it live
steps.description: 3 minutes, show it working, tell the story

slides.quote:
Come with a problem.
Leave with something
*that works.*
slides.attribution: Your Event Name - Your City - Your Date
